Meta.title: Tactical Ecology — city monitoring
Meta.description: City monitoring, map, and AI-powered waste analysis.

Map.selectedHint: Photo analysis will be tied to this point.
Map.incidentRecordedHint: From map and analysis. Dispatch a field team if needed.
Map.incidentErrorHint: Moderation flag or analysis error. Check the photo and address, then retry.

WasteScanner.title: Waste AI
WasteScanner.subtitle: Smart sorting assistant
WasteScanner.pickLocationHint: First tap the map on the right and choose where the waste was photographed.
WasteScanner.uploadHint: After choosing a point — drag a file or tap to browse
WasteScanner.emptyResult: Results will appear after the photo is analyzed on the server.
WasteScanner.ecoFactPlaceholder: After analysis, a recycling fact about the detected material may appear here.

errors.serverParse: Could not parse the server response
errors.network: Network error: could not send the request. Ensure the backend is running and BACKEND_API_URL / NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL is set in .env.

Dashboard.clickOrDrag: Click or drag an image here
Dashboard.markerAnalysisFailed: The server could not process the image. Check the connection and retry.

Incidents.title: Logged incidents
Incidents.subtitle: Everything added from the map: successful scans and moderation issues.
Incidents.emptyHint: Send a photo from Waste Scanner — entries appear here and stay on the map.

Analytics.title: Field ops & analytics
Analytics.subtitle: When cleanup is done, remove the entry — it disappears from the map everywhere.
Analytics.queueHint: Crew: confirm removal after the site is cleared.
Analytics.clearAllConfirm: Delete every map pin? This cannot be undone.
Analytics.deleteConfirm: Remove this incident? "{title}" will disappear from the map.
Analytics.modalDeleteBody: The pin will disappear from the map and incident lists.
Analytics.modalClearBody: Every open incident will be cleared from the map and logs. This can’t be undone.
Analytics.emptyHint: New incidents appear after photo analysis in Waste Scanner.
